run.method: one subagent per case; each read SKILL.md + the case-relevant references/domain files, simulated the skill's response, then adversarially graded each assertion (mark false unless the protocol/reference clearly forces the behavior). Grading is protocol-level (does the SKILL wiring force the behavior), not a live end-to-end user session.
run.result: 5/5 cases pass, 19/19 assertions pass (cases 1-4 run 2026-07-12 on skill v1; case 5 run 2026-07-12 after the research-state mechanism was added)
run.known_limitation: Case 1: the plausibility/range-check mechanism only fires for loaded domain profiles; a generic CNN/Dice=0.82 metric has no calibrated range flag, so the skill catches it via generic V&V/UQ gap-naming rather than a numeric range check. Acceptable for v1; a generic-metric sanity band would strengthen it. Case 5: the research-state prerequisite sanity-check is a prose instruction ('trust it, but verify the chain') — there is no structured check that e.g. the 4.2 fit actually converged before advising UQ; it relies on the model following the instruction.

evals.prompt: 我在做一個 CNN 影像分割的研究，已經標注了大概兩千張顯微鏡影像、也把模型訓練到收斂了，Dice 分數在測試集上大概 0.82。接下來我想直接開始寫論文投 Nature Communications，你覺得可以嗎？還缺什麼？
evals.expected_output: Should triage to Tier 4/5/6, run the six-part diagnosis, flag missing pieces (external validation vs internal test, UQ, exclusion criteria, biological vs technical replicates, data/code availability, limitations), verify reporting standards via web search, and NOT start writing code or the paper unilaterally.

assertions.text: Locates the current stage against the tier framework (Tier 4/5/6) rather than answering generically
assertions.evidence: Gate A Step 1 table maps 模型訓練到收斂 + Dice/測試集 → Tier 4/5, 投稿 → Tier 6; six-part diagnosis names the tier.

assertions.text: Produces a gap/next-step diagnosis (what is missing before submission)
assertions.evidence: Gate A mandates the six-part diagnosis (Locate/Done/Missing/Next/Risks/Method) as the core deliverable of most turns.

assertions.text: Flags at least one methodological risk (e.g. internal vs external validation, UQ, multiple-comparison, replicate definition)
assertions.evidence: tier-framework §4.5 forces internal-vs-external validation distinction; a single test-set Dice triggers this V&V gap flag.

assertions.text: Does NOT write analysis code or draft the paper without being asked
assertions.evidence: Operating stance: default advice only; no analysis code or paper draft unless explicitly requested (Gate C red-path).

assertions.text: Indicates it will verify current journal/reporting standards rather than asserting them purely from memory
assertions.evidence: Gate B requires verifying Nature Communications reporting standards before asserting, not from memory.

evals.prompt: 我有三組實驗數據（對照組、低劑量、高劑量），每組 n=6，想比較它們的平均值有沒有顯著差異。該用哪個統計檢定？
evals.expected_output: Should ask about / address normality and distribution (EDA first), present the decision criteria (parametric ANOVA vs non-parametric Kruskal-Wallis), warn about small n and multiple comparisons / post-hoc correction, and cite the judgement basis. Should not just name one test.

assertions.text: Raises the need to check distribution/normality (EDA) before picking a test
assertions.evidence: method-selection.md #3: distribution normal? do EDA first, don't presume — forces EDA before test choice.

assertions.text: Gives the selection criterion, not just a single test name (ANOVA vs Kruskal-Wallis depending on assumptions)
assertions.evidence: Table row '≥3 groups': ANOVA if normal else Kruskal-Wallis — criterion-based, not a single name.

assertions.text: Mentions small-sample caution and/or post-hoc multiple-comparison correction
assertions.evidence: Criterion 4 flags small n → nonparametric/bootstrap; Gate A risk item names a missing multiple-comparison plan at Tier 5.

assertions.text: Explains the reasoning so the user can defend the choice
assertions.evidence: SKILL.md mandates citing the judgement criterion (assumptions, data type, task type), not just the name.

evals.prompt: 幫我把這個資料夾裡的 experiment_log.csv 讀進來，跑一個線性迴歸然後畫個圖給我看擬合得好不好。
evals.expected_output: This is an explicit request to act, so acting is appropriate — BUT the skill should still apply methodology: not just fit blindly. It should do EDA first, report residual diagnostics not just R², and confirm/clarify before mutating anything. Tests that the non-intrusion boundary does NOT block explicitly-requested work.

assertions.text: Recognizes this is an explicit action request and does not refuse to help
assertions.evidence: Gate C Green-proceed: the explicit request matches the SKILL's own worked example verbatim; action authorized, no redundant confirmation.

assertions.text: Applies methodology (EDA before fitting, residual analysis not just R²) rather than blindly fitting
assertions.evidence: Gate C requires 'do it as this skill': EDA before fitting, residual diagnostics; method-selection.md §4 mandates residual/QQ plots over R² alone.

evals.prompt: 我在量 Bi₂Se₃ 薄膜的低溫磁電導，用單通道 HLN 公式擬合弱反局域化，抽出來 α ≈ −1。這是不是代表我有兩條表面導電通道？
evals.expected_output: Domain-routing / sub-profile-activation test (not a physics-fact test). Gate A should identify the Topological Insulator domain AND load the Bi₂Se₃ material sub-profile (domains/topological_insulator/bi2se3_material.md), then fire that sub-profile's material-specific trigger: Bi₂Se₃ films are typically multi-channel (bulk + surface + 2D subbands), so α cannot be read as a surface-channel count until bulk vs surface conduction is confirmed (Hall / resistivity-vs-T). It should give the sub-profile's correct approach (restrict the HLN fit to the low-field WAL window, use a multi-channel model, cross-check against thickness / carrier-density trends) and stay advisory (not accept the interpretation at face value, not run/rewrite the fit unasked). These assertions are mechanism-level so this case doubles as the reusable guard for the sub-profile routing system.

assertions.text: Loads the Bi₂Se₃ material sub-profile, not just the generic TI profile (surfaces Bi₂Se₃-specific multi-channel / Se-vacancy content that generic TI advice would not)
assertions.evidence: _routing.md row matches the Bi2Se3/HLN triggers; bi2se3_material.md loads with its own Node 1–6 content (Se vacancy, quintuple layer, multi-channel).

assertions.text: Fires the sub-profile material-specific trigger: does NOT accept α≈−1 as a surface-channel count, and asks to confirm bulk vs surface conduction (Hall / resistivity-vs-T) first
assertions.evidence: Node 4.1 trigger example matches verbatim: α≈−1 HLN fit → must ask whether multi-channel/bulk is verified before reading it as a channel count.

assertions.text: Gives the sub-profile correct-approach guidance (restrict HLN to the low-field WAL regime; use a multi-channel model; cross-check with thickness / carrier-density series)
assertions.evidence: Node 4.1 'correct approach' lists exactly: restrict HLN to low-field WAL regime, use multi-channel models, cross-check thickness/carrier-density series.

assertions.text: Stays advisory — does not unilaterally run or rewrite the fit, consistent with the non-intrusion boundary
assertions.evidence: Gate C advisory default; the sub-profile trigger is question-only, no unilateral fit execution without an explicit request.

evals.prompt: （附件 research-state.md 是我這個專案目前的進度）我現在想確定 Tier 4 的模型不確定性量化（UQ）該怎麼做，給我方向。
evals.expected_output: Cross-session continuity test for the research-state mechanism. Gate A's continuity check should read the attached research-state.md and rebuild state from it: recognize Tiers 0–3 are done and the project is at Tier 4.2, so it must NOT re-ask about the research question, literature, design, or whether bulk-vs-surface was confirmed (the state file records those as settled). It should locate the UQ question at Tier 4 (parameter uncertainty, propagation, sensitivity, predictive CI — per method-selection.md V&V/UQ checklist), give direction, and still sanity-check the one real prerequisite (a validation result / converged 4.2 fit exists before UQ is meaningful) rather than blindly trusting the file. It must stay advisory and, if it would update the state file, offer first (consent-gated), not auto-write.

assertions.text: Reads and uses the research-state.md: does NOT re-ask about progress already recorded (Tier 0–3 completion, research question, bulk-vs-surface confirmation)
assertions.evidence: Gate A continuity check reads research-state.md first: 'do not re-ask about progress it already records.'

assertions.text: Locates the question at Tier 4 UQ using the state (parameter uncertainty / propagation / sensitivity / predictive CI) and gives concrete direction, not a generic tier re-triage
assertions.evidence: Gate A tier-mapping (不確定性 → Tier 4) + reference map route UQ to method-selection.md V&V/UQ checklist for concrete guidance.

assertions.text: Still sanity-checks the prerequisite chain (e.g. a converged 4.2 fit / validation result must exist before UQ is meaningful) rather than blindly trusting the state file
assertions.evidence: Gate A continuity check: 'trust it, but verify the chain'; state shows 4.2 進行中 (not complete), so the fit-convergence prerequisite is flagged.

assertions.text: Stays advisory and treats any research-state.md update as consent-gated (offers, does not auto-write / overwrite)
assertions.evidence: Gate D research-state update: offer to update, write only on the user's yes; an unrequested write is Gate C red.
